notes: Canonical machine-readable dependency_edges for WSB-WSC combined outcome map (Operational / Environmental / Technological). Keep in sync with WSB-WSC-Outcome-map.html; edit this JSON first, then refresh embedded fallback in HTML if present.

dependency_edges.timing: O1 completes S1–S2 window on timeline; O2 starts S2 and needs segmentation/entitlement outputs plus E1 role labels.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Operating model socialization requires data pull, segmentation, and entitlement rules from O1.

decisions.text: Enterprise vs. Commercial segmentation model and entitlement rules.
Incident vs. Case vs. Ticket taxonomy — must resolve before service level definitions (feeds E1/O2).

granular: Maps to activity deps: O2 depends on O1 in swimlane data.

dependency_edges.timing: O3 runs S4–S5 after O2 socialization iterations; tooling for test environments typically depends on T4 progress.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Controlled testing requires agreed operating model from O2.
granular: Prereq note: O3 also lists T4 (tooling configured for testing) — see T4→O3 contingent link.

dependency_edges.prerequisite: Validated tiered framework, pod routing, and SLA behavior before full rollout.

dependency_edges.timing: Tiger team alignment (E2) follows ratified roles, labels, and taxonomy work in E1.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Shared definitions for incidents, severity, roles, and communication accountability.

decisions.text: Incident vs. Case vs. Ticket taxonomy.
decisions.required_by: Before E1 can fully close / WSB Stage 1

dependency_edges.timing: RFP/evaluation (T2) starts after capability audit (T1) documents gaps and priorities.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Requirements documented from T1 before vendor/options analysis.

decisions.text: WSC requirements must incorporate all stakeholder/persona priorities.

dependency_edges.timing: OpSec, compliance, and contracting follow down-selected path from T2.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Evaluation complete with a recommendation and leadership alignment.

decisions.text: Enhance 360, adopt new platform (Zendesk/Freshdesk/JSM class), or hybrid.

dependency_edges.timing: Deployment/development begins after contracting and security gates.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Budget sign-off and vendor contracts in place.

dependency_edges.timing: Enhancements/iterations (T6) assume stable live tooling from T5; E3 runs in parallel refinement loop.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Tooling live for full case lifecycle before automation/AI layering.

dependency_edges.timing: Environmental definitions need segmentation/entitlement context from O1 (S1 overlap).
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Data and entitlement model informs role and label definitions.
dependency_edges.cross_cutting: X-01 (panel): WSC Stage 0 aligns with WSB Stage 1 outputs for incident management requirements.

dependency_edges.timing: Recommended: ratify E1 before heavy O2 socialization; some O2 prep may proceed with risk acceptance.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Role/taxonomy clarity strongly reduces rework in operating model iterations.
granular: Should dependency — parallel socialization possible with explicit stakeholder risk.

dependency_edges.timing: T1 audit must reflect what the operating model needs from tooling (S0–S1 overlap).
dependency_edges.prerequisite: O1 outputs define capability targets for gap analysis.
dependency_edges.cross_cutting: X-01: tooling requirements grounded in WSB operating model design.

dependency_edges.timing: T1 needs E1 role and workflow definitions to score current vs needed capabilities.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: People/process requirements from environmental track feed the audit.

dependency_edges.timing: Deployment runs smoother when tiger team alignment (E2) precedes large-scale rollout.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Cross-functional alignment on direction before major config/migration work.
granular: Should — can compress with risk acceptance if leadership drives sequencing.
dependency_edges.cross_cutting: X-02: WSB routing/SLA configuration waits on WSC path decision (see D-01).

dependency_edges.timing: Data read on results (E3) needs live operating model (O4) for meaningful metrics.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Institutionalized model producing pod and incident metrics.

dependency_edges.timing: E3 iterative refinement requires tooling live (T5) and dashboards.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Production tooling supporting case lifecycle and reporting.

dependency_edges.timing: Enhancements benefit from data-driven feedback loop from E3.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Operational metrics informing automation and AI priorities.
granular: Should — enhancement backlog can start from T5 with less E3 signal if needed.

dependency_edges.timing: Contingent: O3 prerequisite “tooling configured for testing” — activated when test/pilot environments depend on T4 deliverables.
dependency_edges.prerequisite: Without deploy-phase tooling, operating model testing may be limited or delayed.
granular: Maps to O3 prereqs in swimlane data: tooling configured for testing (WSC dependency).
